de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl

Class SymbolicEquivalenceClass

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl.AbstractElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl.SymbolicEquivalenceClass
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ISymbolicElement, ISymbolicEquivalenceClass

    public class SymbolicEquivalenceClass
extends AbstractElement
implements ISymbolicEquivalenceClass
    Default implementation of ISymbolicEquivalenceClass.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
